info.description: Person profiles (ambassadors, judges, leadership, etc.), grouped by the free-text `category` field. The full pathSlug sets both the URL and the file location: a 'summit/' prefix stores under summit, 'hackathon/' under hackathon, anything else under foundation.

pathSlug.description: Full path from the site root, no leading slash. Determines the URL and storage folder. Examples: hackathon/2025/judges/jane-doe; summit/2025/speakers/jane-doe; team/jane-doe.

role.description: Job title or role shown under the profile name on the detail page (e.g. 'Open Web Advocate & Open Source Contributor').

photo.description: Image alt text comes from the media Alternative text field when set; otherwise MDX export uses the profile name as photoAlt.

category.description: Groups profiles for summary views (e.g. '2025 Hackathon Judges', 'Leadership Team', 'Fellows 2026').
